title: Here's the kicker. NFL folks are running for Congress.
shortDescription: The wife of Super Bowl champion Plaxico Burress and ex-sideline reporter Michele Tafoya are among candidates with NFL ties running for Congress.

title: Trump: ‘I’m speaking for the UK more than Prince Harry’
shortDescription: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday (April 23) said Britain's Prince Harry was 'not speaking for the UK' after a reporter asked about Harry's plea to the U.S. to end the Ukraine war.

title: Does gerrymandering risk disenfranchising some voters?
shortDescription: A total of seven states now have new congressional district maps. Will Florida give the advantage to Republicans?

title: Republicans emerge on back foot from Virginia's referendum. Here's how
shortDescription: Republicans started a redistricting fight to grab more seats in the midterms. But if Virginia's vote survives legal challenges, GOP could be losing.

title: The midterms battle for House control is in full swing | The Excerpt
shortDescription: In pushing Texas to redraw its district map, President Donald Trump kicked off an arms race that Republicans might end up regretting.

title: Hegseth says Iran acting like 'pirates' while Trump blockades ports
shortDescription: Trump's blocking traffic to Iran's ports aims to starve the country economically but Tehran continues to threaten shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump says Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended
shortDescription: President Donald Trump announced Thursday that a temporary ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon has been extended by three weeks.

title: Trump gives 'filthy' Reflecting Pool a facelift on National Mall
shortDescription: Trump directed contractors to clean and resurface the iconic Reflecting Pool near the Lincoln Memorial after it fell into disrepair.

title: Trump says he won't use nuclear weapon in Iran
shortDescription: President Trump forcefully denied that he would use a nuclear weapon against Iran, calling the question “stupid."

title: Melania Trump spotlights efforts to protect kids
shortDescription: In a speech at the First Lady's Luncheon, Melania Trump highlighted her efforts to protect children, including a recent foster care legislation push.

title: Melania Trump touts youth initiatives at annual First Lady's Luncheon
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump highlighted her work to better the lives of young people at the 113th annual First Lady's Luncheon in Washington, DC.

title: Melania Trump hosts annual luncheon focused on foster care
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump and second lady Usha Vance attend the 113th annual First Lady's Luncheon on April 23, 2026, in Washington, DC.

title: 'Fantastic man': Trump praises King Charles ahead of state visit
shortDescription: In a phone interview with the BBC, Trump heaped praise on the British monarch amid strained US-UK relations and the upcoming royal state visit.

title: Once a Trump supporter, Tucker Carlson says he’s 'tormented' by his actions
shortDescription: Conservative commentator Tucker Carlson was once an outspoken Trump supporter and defender of his policies. Now he says he is 'tormented' by his actions.

title: 'Disappointed, confused' PA Dems not supporting Fetterman in 2028
shortDescription: Pennsylvania Democrats didn't offer support Sen. John Fetterman's reelection in 2028 as they are 'disappointed' and 'disagree' with his votes.

title: Trump touts drug pricing pact with Regeneron aimed at lowering costs
shortDescription: Regeneron will be the final of 17 large pharmaceutical companies to sign such a drug pricing agreement with the Trump administration.

title: Could Alexandria and Arlington, Virginia, be added to Washington DC?
shortDescription: Virginia congressman Rick McCormick introduced legislation the Make DC Square Again Act, which would add Alexandria and Arlington to Washington DC.

title: Trump, the marijuana restriction change and what to know about THC
shortDescription: As the Justice Department moves to reclassify medical marijuana products as less dangerous, we're answering your burning questions about THC.

title: Lawsuit says park service violated free speech over anti-Trump signs
shortDescription: The complaint alleged the National Park Service threatened to revoke a protest permit over signs accusing President Donald Trump of sexual misconduct.

title: Congressman David Scott dies at 80. Remembering his legacy in Atlanta
shortDescription: US House Representative David Scott died at 80 just a day after casting a vote in Washington. The Georgia politician long served the Atlanta area.

title: Senate moves ahead on Homeland Security funding
shortDescription: The Senate votes to advance a $70 billion plan to fund Homeland Security agencies including ICE in a "vote-a-rama" that lasted nearly six hours..

title: Could Georgia turn blue this election season? What polls are showing
shortDescription: Democrats are making significant gains in Georgia ahead of the primary elections in May. Could this be a new era for the Peach State?
